item.title: Download Winslop 26.03.41
item.description: What is "Slop"? The term "slop" refers to low-value system components that are often pre-installed and contribute little or no useful function. These elements consume valuable resources and can reduce user efficiency by limiting overall system control. Information about Winslop software Winslop is a lightweight and innovative utility for Windows. This tool is designed to remove unnecessary components in the system, often referred to as "slop," which can degrade operating system...

item.title: Download Paste Into File 5.5
item.description: Windows Explorer can only paste the copied files, but cannot paste images, texts and other content that have been copied from inside applications or when taking screenshots. Paste Into File allows you to paste the clipboard content directly into the files through a new item in the context menu of the Explorer file and/or additional shortcuts. It can also do the opposite: Copy the file content to the live clipboard. Previously, you had to open an image/text/office/archive application,...
